lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require substantial mechanical work and cosmetic restoration to be safely driven. There is significant rust on the wheel wells and undercarriage, and the interior shows heavy wear and tear. The engine runs but has a noticeable knock, and the transmission slips in reverse. This is a project car sold strictly as-is.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows noticeable wear and tear from regular use. All mechanical systems are operational, though some components may require maintenance in the near future.

Looking for a reliable and well-maintained ride? This vehicle is in good condition and ready to hit the road! It has been cared for nicely, offering a smooth driving experience and a clean appearance with only some light, typical wear. It's a fantastic, dependable choice for anyone seeking a quality car that's been treated with respect!

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic work to be made roadworthy again. The engine has a persistent knock and struggles to stay running, while the transmission exhibits severe slipping. Externally, there is substantial rust damage along the quarter panels and undercarriage, and the paint is heavily oxidized. The interior shows heavy wear, including torn seating and a non-functional climate control system. This car is being sold strictly as-is and would be an ideal project for a restoration enthusiast or a source for spare parts.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The engine and transmission require significant repairs to be functional. The exterior has major body damage, visible rust, and widespread paint failure. The interior is heavily worn with significant damage to the upholstery and dashboard.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious blend of reliability and sophisticated engineering. Demonstrating consistent care and a documented history of performance, this automobile stands as a premier selection for the discerning driver. Its structural integrity and aesthetic appeal remain notably preserved, ensuring a premium ownership experience and immediate road-readiness.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable new-to-you ride? I'm selling my car and it's in wonderful shape! It’s been super dependable for me, and I’ve made sure to keep up with everything so it’s ready for the road. It drives like a dream and is just waiting for its next adventure. I’d love for it to go to a great home—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of the legendary S54-powered platform. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six features individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline, delivering linear power through a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox. Chassis dynamics are sharp thanks to a variable M differential lock and a reinforced rear subframe, addressing the platform's known structural requirements. The VANOS system has been recently serviced to ensure optimal cam timing and torque delivery. Finished in a classic palette with well-preserved bolsters, this vehicle maintains excellent compression across all cylinders and offers the tactile steering feedback only a true hydraulic rack can provide. A purist’s spec, ready for the spirited driver.
Used car in good condition. Runs well. Maintenance records available. Clean interior. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and reliability, maintained with a high standard of care. The exterior finish retains a vibrant luster, accented by well-preserved trim, while showing only the minor, expected signs of careful road use. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and delivers responsive power, complemented by a transmission that shifts precisely through every gear. Inside, the cabin offers a clean and inviting environment; the premium upholstery is in excellent shape, and all convenience features—from the crisp infotainment display to the dual-zone climate control—are fully operational. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection, ensuring this car is ready for its next owner to drive away with confidence.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies consistent care and mechanical integrity. This selection offers a refined driving experience and remains in commendable aesthetic condition, balancing performance with exceptional value. It stands as a testament to diligent ownership and is prepared for immediate acquisition by a discerning driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and value. Demonstrating a history of consistent care, it remains in commendable condition, both mechanically and aesthetically. An ideal choice for the professional seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my reliable ride, and it’s honestly been such a dream to drive. It’s in great shape and has been super well-maintained, so you can just hop in and go! It’s perfect for anyone who wants a dependable, stylish car without the brand-new price tag. I’d love for it to go to a good home where it'll be appreciated as much as I have!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies. The high-revving powerplant is mated to a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural integrity under high lateral loads. Suspension geometry remains tight with refreshed bushings, while the ventilated rotors provide consistent thermal management. Finished in Carbon Black, this driver-focused example offers raw mechanical feedback and telepathic steering response.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Mechanically sound. Serious inquiries only.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior retains a deep, mirror-like gloss, showing only the minor stone chips and light road-wear consistent with careful highway driving. Inside, the cabin is a true sanctuary—smoke-free and exceptionally clean, with plush leather seating that has aged gracefully and remains supple. All power features, including the high-fidelity sound system and dual-zone climate control, function exactly as they should. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts seamlessly, backed by a consistent service history that ensures peace of mind for the next owner. This car has been garage-kept and treated with the respect it deserves, making it an ideal choice for a discerning buyer seeking a high-quality pre-owned vehicle that looks and drives beautifully.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard. It offers a seamless blend of performance and reliability, characterized by its well-preserved interior and consistent mechanical integrity. For the professional seeking a vehicle that balances executive presence with proven durability, this offering stands as a superior selection within its market segment.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive engineering, this vehicle has been curated to meet the expectations of the sophisticated motorist. It exhibits a well-preserved exterior and a meticulously kept interior, reflecting a history of responsible ownership. Fully serviced and prepared for immediate delivery, this motorcar offers an optimal synthesis of reliability and prestige.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been super well-loved? I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s honestly in such great shape! It’s been well-maintained and drives like a dream. It’s perfect for someone who wants a solid, dependable vehicle without the brand-new price tag. I’d love for it to go to a good home—come see it for yourself!

This 997.1 Carrera features the iconic 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six, delivering linear power delivery through a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis benefits from Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM), providing exceptional lateral stability and communicative steering feedback. Mechanically sound with documented service history addressing the IMS bearing and rear main seal. The drivetrain remains robust, offering a visceral 7,200 RPM redline and a perfectly balanced rear-engine weight bias for superior corner-exit traction. A driver-focused example ready for spirited apex-hunting.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance. Ready for immediate use.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and utility. The exterior shines with a deep gloss, showing only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin with supple leather seating and a fully functional infotainment suite. Mechanically, it is in excellent health; I have kept a rigorous service schedule, including a recent oil change and a full brake inspection. The engine pulls smoothly, and the transmission shifts seamlessly, providing a confident driving experience. This car has been garage-kept and professionally detailed, ensuring it remains in impressive shape for its next owner. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a weekend getaway, this vehicle is turn-key ready. Includes a comprehensive service history, two sets of keys, and all original manuals.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been maintained to a high standard, ensuring both mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. It offers a refined driving experience, characterized by smooth power delivery and a well-preserved cabin environment. This represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a reliable, high-caliber vehicle that balances sophisticated performance with exceptional value.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Maintained to a rigorous standard, it exhibits consistent performance and a refined interior that reflects a history of careful ownership. Fully inspected for mechanical integrity and presented with a sophisticated aesthetic, this motorcar offers an ideal balance of luxury and proven reliability. We invite you to experience a vehicle that remains in commendable form, prepared for immediate delivery.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been an absolute dream to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. If you’re looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road, this is the one for you! Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 is a driver’s specimen featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, renowned for its individual throttle bodies and high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. The powertrain delivers linear torque via a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory M Variable Differential Lock. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and subframe reinforcement, ensuring structural integrity under high lateral loads. Suspension kinematics remain sharp with refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers. While showing honest signs of use consistent with its mileage, the mechanical synchronization and throttle response are quintessential M-division. A mechanically sound example ready for spirited B-road carving.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-cared-for daily driver that balances performance with everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish, though a discerning eye will find minor road-born chips on the front bumper and small superficial scratches consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the upholstery is firm and free of tears, and every button, dial, and digital display functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is turn-key ready. It has undergone regular oil changes and recent brake service, ensuring a smooth, confident ride with crisp gear shifts and responsive handling. The air conditioning blows ice-cold, and the tires offer substantial tread life for many seasons to come. While it shows the gentle character of a pre-owned vehicle, its mechanical integrity and overall presentation make it a standout choice for anyone seeking a reliable, high-quality ride without the new-car price

Presenting a refined example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been meticulously maintained to ensure peak performance and reliability. Offering a sophisticated driving experience, it represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a balance of quality and value. Each component has been thoroughly vetted to meet our rigorous standards for safety and operation, ensuring this vehicle is prepared for immediate delivery.
